page.name: A list of online collaboration tools
page.content: <script src="https://groups.diigo.com/user_mana/link_roll_data?group_name=sync-environments-tools&icon=true&width=600&count=15&title=Tools%20for%20facilitating%20learning%20in%20synchronous%20environments&tags=&token=" type="text/javascript"></script> <noscript>&amp;lt;a href="https://groups.diigo.com/group/sync-environments-tools" &amp;gt;Tools for facilitating learning in synchronous environments&amp;lt;/a&amp;gt;</noscript>
